description: Reduce a session's effective message-stream size before next LLM call, using the cheapest available kind that fits constraints.

activities.name: Evaluate compaction need (state-driven)
activities.description: Each runloop iteration reads observable state and returns Optional<Observed>. Sets no flags. DD-1.

activities.name: Maintain Memory
activities.description: Per-session persistent memory artifact. Primary content TurnSummary; auxiliary file/action metadata.

activities.name: Capture TurnSummary at runloop exit
activities.description: DD-2: only at runloop exit, not mid-run. lastAssistant final text appended to Memory.turnSummaries.

activities.name: Track file/action auxiliary metadata
activities.description: Legacy SharedContext role retained as auxiliary. Not primary memory content.

activities.name: Persist Memory + read with legacy fallback
activities.description: DD-3: write only to new path; read with fallback to SharedContext + checkpoint if new path empty.

activities.name: Throttle (Cooldown)
activities.description: Prevent repeated compaction within window. Reads Memory.lastCompactedAt; no separate state. DD-7.

activities.name: Execute compaction kind
activities.description: Walk KIND_CHAIN table indexed by observed; first kind that succeeds writes the Anchor.

activities.name: Free narrative
activities.description: Use Memory.renderForLLM as Anchor body. Zero API. C5.

activities.name: Free schema
activities.description: Legacy SharedContext.snapshot output. Zero API. Used only when narrative empty. C6.

activities.name: Free replay-tail
activities.description: Last N raw rounds serialized as plain text. Zero API. C7.

activities.name: Low-cost server-side
activities.description: Plugin.trigger session.compact (codex/openai /responses/compact). Cheaper than full LLM round but counts toward 5h burst. C8.

inputs: conversation items built from message stream

activities.name: LLM agent
activities.description: Full LLM round with custom compaction prompt. Most expensive; final fallback. C9.

removed_activities.name: Schedule next-round compaction
removed_activities.reason: DD-1 — replaced by A1 state-driven evaluation

removed_activities.name: Mark pending rebind compaction
removed_activities.reason: DD-1 — flag deleted; processor.ts only updates pinned identity
